Standard Terms and Conditions
Documents related to NLR's standard terms and conditions for subcontracts or purchase
    orders are available below.
Standard Terms and Conditions – Appendix B
The following appendices were issued Jan. 23, 2023.
Appendix B-1
Standard Terms and Conditions For Research and Development and Technical Services Subcontracts, Cost-Type
,
    including:
Cost Sharing
Cost Reimbursement
Cost Plus Fixed Fee
Appendix B-2
Standard Terms and Conditions For Research and Development Subcontracts
, including:
Firm Fixed Price
Fixed Unit Price
Appendix B-3
Standard Terms and Conditions for Supplies and Services (Where Service Contract Act Applies)
,
    including:
Firm Fixed Price
Fixed Unit Price
Appendix B-4
Standard Terms and Conditions for Construction Subcontracts
Appendix B-5
Standard Terms and Conditions for Firm Fixed Price Subcontracts for Architect-Engineering Services
Appendix B-6
Standard Terms and Conditions for Technical Services (Where Service Contract Act Does Not Apply)
, including:
Labor Hour
Labor Hour and Expense
Consultant Agreements
Appendix B-7
Standard Terms and Conditions for Technical Services (Where Service Contract Act Does Not Apply)
,
    including:
Firm Fixed Price
Fixed Unit Price
Appendix B-8
Subcontracts and Purchase Orders for Commercial Items (Goods and Services)
, including:
Firm Fixed Price
Fixed Unit Price
Appendix B-8H
Subcontracts and Purchase Orders for Commercial Items (Goods and Services)
,
    including:
Firm Fixed Price
Fixed Unit Price Level of Effort
Labor Hours
Time and Materials
Appendix B-9
Standard Terms and Conditions for Subcontracts With Educational Institutions (Other Than Foreign)
,
    including:
Cost Sharing
Cost Reimbursement
Cost Plus Fixed Fee
Appendix B-10
Standard Terms and Conditions for Firm Fixed Price Subcontracts for Design/Build
Standard Terms and Conditions – Appendix C
The following appendices were issued Aug. 1, 2022.
Appendix C-1
Intellectual Property Provisions for Large Business, State and Local Governments, or Foreign Organizations (Research, Development, or Demonstration)
Appendix C-2
Intellectual Property Provisions for Domestic Small Business, Educational Institutions, and Other Nonprofit Organizations (Research, Development, or Demonstrations)
Appendix C-3
Intellectual Property Provisions for Large and Small Business, Nonprofit Organizations, Educational Institutions, and Others (Non-Research and Development)
Standard Terms and Conditions – Appendices D, E, F
Appendix D
(March 1, 2020)
Standard Terms and Conditions for Subcontracts in Excess of $700,000
Appendix E
(March 1, 2020)
Standard Terms and Conditions for Travel Requirements
for the following subcontract types:
Cost Sharing
Cost Reimbursement
Cost Plus Fixed Fee
Fixed Unit Price
Labor Hour
Labor Hour and Expenses
Time and Materials
Consultants
Purchase Orders
Appendix F
(Dec. 9, 2025)
Small Business Lower-Tier Subcontracting Plan
Archived Appendices
Appendices issued March 1, 2020
Appendices issued Dec. 15, 2016
Appendices issued July 11, 2014–Aug. 3, 2015
Appendices issued March 26, 2012–Jan. 15, 2013
Appendices issued Aug. 5, 2010
